message:
🐛 Fix token subcategory tracking for result and stream messages (#616)

Token tracking was only being called for 'progress' messages, but
token counts are also reported in:
- 'result' messages (when complete response is sent)
- 'stream' messages (when done=true with usage data)

Now calls addCategoryTokens() in all three message handlers,
ensuring token subcategories (AI Missions, Diagnose, etc.) properly
accumulate usage.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
